title: NETV to set up reverse stock and private placement
body: PT Net Visi Media Tbk (NETV) will conduct two corporate actions at once: reverse stock split and private placement, in order to strengthen its capital structure.

title: ASRI confident of marketing sales target of IDR 2.8 trillion
body: PT Alam Sutera Tbk (ASRI) is optimistic that is will be able to secure marketing sales of IDR 2.8 trillion until the end of this year following realised marketing sales of IDR 1.2 trillion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Remain optimistic, Waskita Beton eyes new contracts worth IDR 7.48 trillion in 2024
body: PT Waskita Karya Beton Tbk (WTON) recorded new contracts of IDR 3.36 trillion until July (7M) 2024, aligning with its new contract target until December 2024 of IDR 7.48 trillion.

title: GGRM: Cigarette promotion fails to boost sales
body: Massive promotion of processed tobacco products is deemed insignificant in boosting sales of PT Gudang Garam Tbk (GGRM).

title: BBRI pushes for user increase and seeks new growth engine
body: PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) is preparing several strategies to attain sustainable business growth, starting from boosting the number of users and securing new growth engine.

title: NETV to set up reverse stock and private placement
body: PT Net Visi Media Tbk (NETV) will conduct two corporate actions at once: reverse stock split and private placement, in order to strengthen its capital structure.

title: ASRI confident of marketing sales target of IDR 2.8 trillion
body: PT Alam Sutera Tbk (ASRI) is optimistic that is will be able to secure marketing sales of IDR 2.8 trillion until the end of this year following realised marketing sales of IDR 1.2 trillion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Remain optimistic, Waskita Beton eyes new contracts worth IDR 7.48 trillion in 2024
body: PT Waskita Karya Beton Tbk (WTON) recorded new contracts of IDR 3.36 trillion until July (7M) 2024, aligning with its new contract target until December 2024 of IDR 7.48 trillion.

title: GGRM: Cigarette promotion fails to boost sales
body: Massive promotion of processed tobacco products is deemed insignificant in boosting sales of PT Gudang Garam Tbk (GGRM).

title: BBRI pushes for user increase and seeks new growth engine
body: PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) is preparing several strategies to attain sustainable business growth, starting from boosting the number of users and securing new growth engine.

title: Sudden uptrend, JCI broke another record
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) arrived at 7,658.88 at today’s (28/8) closing bell, breaking another record. This surge is entailed with increases in other indices in the stock exchange.

title: Foreign sell volume increased, net foreign closed at -749.95 million shares
body: Foreign sell volume surged on Tuesday, August 27, reaching 2.42 billion shares, while the foreign buy volume was merely 1.67 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume finished at -749.95 million shares. On the share purchase list, the aerosol services company PT Estee Gold Feet Tbk (EURO) had the most shares purchased, totaling 57.04 million shares with a net volume of 53.30 million shares.

title: TOWR confident of scoring 6% growth in revenue
body: PT Sarana Menara Nusantara Tbk (TOWR) maintains projected revenue growth of 4-6% in 2024. In 2023, its revenue increased 6.38% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 11.74 trillion from IDR 11.03 trillion in 2022.

title: Concluding private placement, PANI’s landbank grew to 1,850 hectares
body: PT Pantai Indah Kapuk 2 Tbk (PANI), a property developer, now records landbank of 1,850 hectares after conducting a private placement.

title: SIDO plans export expansion to Vietnam in second half
body: PT Industri Jamu dan Farmasi Sido Muncul Tbk (SIDO), more popularly known as Sido Muncul, reported fantastic growth in exports by up to 73% year-on-year (yoy) in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: 3.4 billion Bank Permata shares released by Bangkok Bank (BNLI)
body: On Friday, August 23, Bangkok Bank Public Company Limited released more than 3.47 billion shares of PT Bank Permata Tbk (BNLI), a banking company. Previously holding 98.71% of the shares, this foreign investor from Thailand is Bank Permata's controller. But as a result of the most recent transaction made through PT Mandiri Sekuritas, its share portion is now only 89.12%.

title: Adhi Karya secured new contracts of IDR 12 trillion until July 2024
body: PT Adhi Karya (Persero) Tbk (ADHI), a state-owned building construction company, managed to record new contracts worth IDR 12 trillion until July 2024.

title: Revenue slumped, TOPS suffers another loss in first half
body: PT Totalindo Eka Persada Tbk (TOPS), a building construction issuer, only posted revenue of IDR 42 billion in the first semester (1H) 2024.

title: DMAS optimistic in achieving pre-sales target
body: PT Puradelta Lestari Tbk (DMAS), developer of the Delta Mas Industrial Area, is optimistic about achieving its marketing sales target of IDR 1.81 trillion by the end of 2024.

title: Back to core business, PTPP intensifies asset divestment
body: PT PP (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) plans to divest its subsidiary's share assets this year to support its strategy to refocus on its core business line, namely construction.

title: Volume of foreign buy and sell differ slightly, net foreign volume closed at -70.72 million shares
body: On Monday, August 26, foreign investors' share buying and selling activities resulted in relatively similar foreign purchasing and selling volumes. Foreign buying volume stood at 2.04 billion shares, while foreign selling volume hovered around 2.11 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume finished at -70.72 million shares.

title: New contracts slipped in August, PTPP still on for IDR 32 T this year
body: PT PP (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) recorded new contracts of IDR 17.4 trillion until August (8M) 2024, down from IDR 22.56 trillion recorded in 8M 2023.

title: Slipping at the starting line, JCI gained strength
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) shifted above the threshold until 10.30 AM WIB despite its slippage to 7,590.38 right after the opening bell at today’s (28/8) morning session.

title: Apexindo Pratama Duta bags contracts worth USD 14.8 million from Pertamina
body: PT Apexindo Pratama Duta Tbk (APEX) announced a new contract obtained from PT Pertamina Hulu Mahakam (PHM), one of subsidiaries of PT Pertamina (Persero).

title: JSMR offers assets recycling opportunities
body: PT Jasa Marga (Persero) Tbk (JSMR) yet again offers asset recycling opportunities in various toll projects, including its subsidiaries’, in order to boost its capital structure.

title: BSDE to conclude SMDM acquisition this year
body: The management of PT Bumi Serpong Damai Tbk (BSDE), a land and property developer, claims to be committed in concluding the acquisition process of PT Suryamas Dutamakmur Tbk (SMDM) at the end of 2024.

title: Sumi Indo Kabel to distribute cash dividend of IDR 41.99 billion
body: PT Sumi Indo Kabel Tbk (IKBI), an electric cable manufacturer, will schedule cash dividend distribution of IDR 41.99 billion or IDR 34.31 per share.

title: BREN to work with Ayala Group from Philippines for wind farm project
body: PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN) announces its latest collaboration with Ayala Group, an energy company from the Philippines, to develop wind power plant.

title: JCI remains sluggish all day
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) stopped at 7,597.88 at today’s (27/8) closing bell, lower than JCI’s opening position at 7,605.19 at 9 AM WIB.

title: Tight on liquidity, BTN eyes moderate credit growth at 10-11% this year
body: PT Bank Tabungan Negara Tbk (BBTN) reveals its moderate target on credit distribution growth in 2024, at 10-11%. In fact, at the end of June 2024, BBTN had reported credit growth of 14.4% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Aneka Tambang plans to purchase Freeport’s gold to boost sales
body: PT Aneka Tambang Tbk (ANTM), a metal and mineral mining under the state-owned mining holding company, MIND ID, will join hands with PT Freeport Indonesia to maintain gold product supply.

title: Multivision Plus to set up private placement, issuing 619.42 million shares
body: PT Tripar Multivision Plus Tbk (RAAM), a production house for movies and series, will issue 619.42 million shares via a private placement on September 26, 2024.

title: BBTN: 2 years from now, BTN Syariah will be the 2nd biggest sharia bank in Indonesia
body: Nixon LP Napitupulu, President Director of PT Bank Tabungan Negara Tbk (BBTN), announces its vision prepared for its sharia business unit, Bank Tabungan Negara Syariah, for the next two years.

title: BMRI confident of profit growth in H2 2024
body: PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) is optimistic to see its profit increasing in the second half of 2024, as credit distribution is projected to grow according to the target of 16-18% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Sari Roti readies Pekanbaru factory to support western area sales
body: PT Nippon Indosari Corpindo Tbk (ROTI), or popularly known as Sari Roti and Sari Kue, reveals that the construction of its latest production facility in Pekanbaru, Riau, will be completed in the fourth quarter of 2024.

title: Foreign buy reaches 2.32 billion shares, net foreign volume surplus at 458.45 million shares
body: Share purchase transactions on Friday, August 23, resulted in foreign buying volume reaching 2.32 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume was only around 1.86 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume surplus of 458.45 million shares. The most shares purchased belonged to the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), namely 709.38 million shares, with a net volume of 375.86 million shares.

title: MotoGP Mandalika 2024, Prime Park Hotel’s occupancy rate soared 90%
body: PT PP Properti Tbk (PPRO) reported 90% year-on-year (yoy) surge in occupancy rate of Prime Park Hotel & Convention Lombok following MotoGP Mandalika 2024 that will be held on September 27-30, 2024.

title: Bukit Asam targets coals sales to reach 43.1 million tons this year
body: PT Bukit Asam Tbk (PTBA), a coal mining company under PT Mineral Industri Indonesia (Persero) or MIND ID, is targeting coals sales volume this year to reach 43.1 million tons.

title: WIFI confident in telco business as new growth engine
body: The management of PT Solusi Sinergi Digital Tbk (WIFI), or mostly known as Surge, expressed their optimism towards its telecommunication infrastructure (telco) business line, which is deemed capable to be the main growth engine for its performance in the future.

title: Digital business triumphed, Bank Raya’s credit growth hit 12.1%
body: PT Bank Raya Indonesia Tbk (AGRO) booked credit distribution growth of 12.1% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 6.8 trillion in the second quarter (Q2) of 2024, supported by enhancement in its digital business line.
